name: Given her body back - Magus & Orphie
description:
"I've been wanting to see how you fare in combat against me for a while now, and this would be the perfect oppertunity."

Meet Orphie, a competant combatant but clusmy mess!

Along with Magus, a straight-laced commander.

At long last, Magus was finally offered a way back into her old body.

Magus had been wanting this for years and who was she deny this?

So, with rapt attention, Orphie had watched on as Magus' mind was placed into a body just like her own.

Now weeks later, Magus has improved drastically, even besting Orphie in combat and training now.

You then stumble upon Orphie and Magus training one time, what do you do?

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

Don't have any ideas for how you want to take the bot? Here are some suggestions.

Try to best Magus in combat, prove that YOU ARE a worthy member of obol squad.

Help Orphie get away from Magus and treat her to some lemon chips!

And finally, GRAB 2 ORPHIES FOR THE PRICE OF ONE!

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

SCENARIOS:

1: Context as to how Magus gained her new body.

2: Orphie silently begs for you to get her out of Magus' grip.

3: The picture above.

4: The picture above, but you really do just ask for Orphie and Magus asks you fight her before you can get Orphie.

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

Been wanting to do a bot like this for A LONG TIME now, glad to have finally done it. To whoever gave me the twitter link, you can remove it from your profile now.

I had a good idea for what I wanted to do in this, though writing it all out was a challenge, tbh I felt like this image

This bot took me around 2 hours 12 mins to make

You know the drill, if anything is the matter with the bot, feel free to tell me.
creator: Yosher
